name: Ubiquiti Access Gate Hub
title: Ubiquiti Access Gate Hub
short_description: The Ubiquiti Access Gate Hub (UA-Hub-Gate) serves as the central component for advanced access control systems, designed to manage and secure access points efficiently. Supporting up to three controlled doors, this hub integrates seamlessly with Ubiquiti’s UniFi Access ecosystem, providing centralized management through an intuitive interface.
description: The Ubiquiti Access Gate Hub (UA-Hub-Gate) serves as the central component for advanced access control systems, designed to manage and secure access points efficiently. Supporting up to three controlled doors, this hub integrates seamlessly with Ubiquiti’s UniFi Access ecosystem, providing centralized management through an intuitive interface. Its compatibility with UniFi Access Readers ensures secure communication and streamlined operations, while the built-in relays and inputs for various door types, such as electromagnetic locks and exit buttons, enhance system versatility. With its seamless integration and powerful control features, the UA-Hub-Gate is ideal for modern access management needs. The hub supports Wiegand-based systems, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of third-party devices. With features such as automatic fail-safe operation and the ability to manage multiple doors simultaneously, the UA-Hub-Gate ensures uninterrupted access control even in critical security setups.

detailed_description.heading: Centralized Access Control
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Access Gate Hub (UA-Hub-Gate) serves as the central component for advanced access control systems, designed to manage and secure access points efficiently. Supporting up to three controlled doors, this hub integrates seamlessly with Ubiquiti’s UniFi Access ecosystem, providing centralized management through an intuitive interface. Its compatibility with UniFi Access Readers ensures secure communication and streamlined operations, while the built-in relays and inputs for various door types, such as electromagnetic locks and exit buttons, enhance system versatility. With its seamless integration and powerful control features, the UA-Hub-Gate is ideal for modern access management needs. The hub supports Wiegand-based systems, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of third-party devices. With features such as automatic fail-safe operation and the ability to manage multiple doors simultaneously, the UA-Hub-Gate ensures uninterrupted access control even in critical security setups.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Communication Protocols
detailed_description.text: The UA-Hub-Gate is engineered for reliability and scalability, catering to small offices, commercial spaces, and enterprise environments. Its robust design allows it to operate in demanding conditions, and the PoE-powered connectivity minimizes wiring complexity during installation. The Hub uses encrypted communication protocols to enhance security and prevent unauthorized access. By leveraging secure channels between the hub, readers, and the UniFi Access application, it guarantees the integrity and confidentiality of access data. The system’s advanced logging capabilities enable detailed monitoring and reporting of access events, which are easily retrievable via the UniFi Controller. These features not only enhance security but also simplify compliance with stringent access control regulations, making it an excellent solution for environments where data integrity and reliability are paramount.

detailed_description.heading: Simple Setup
detailed_description.text: Designed with user convenience in mind, the UA-Hub-Gate offers a straightforward installation process that minimizes setup complexity. The device integrates seamlessly with the UniFi Access application, providing a centralized platform for real-time control, scheduling, and monitoring of access points. The UniFi Access application enables administrators to manage access permissions, create user groups, and set access schedules with ease. The device supports firmware updates, allowing users to benefit from new features and improvements over time. The UA-Hub-Gate is powered by 802.3bt Power over Ethernet (PoE++), simplifying wiring requirements and enhancing installation flexibility. With its plug-and-play design and highly intuitive user interface, the UA-Hub-Gate simplifies access control management, reducing deployment times and ensuring a seamless user experience across diverse environments.
